name: revenueByProvider
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.summary.every(function(s){return typeof s.provider === 'string' && Number.isFinite(s.appointments) && Number.isFinite(s.revenue);})
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (path-3; NOT assassin-enumerated). COMPONENT-EXACT shape: RevenueRetentionPanel sends a SOLE-KEY {artifact:{data:{appointments,period}}} body so the dispatch peel (lib/lens-input-normalize.js) unwraps it to {appointments,period}, feeding BOTH the handler's artifact.data.appointments read AND its params.period read. A 2-key {artifact:{data},period} body is deliberately NOT peeled and would strand appointments (DEAD calculator) — fixed 2026-06-28. RETURNS {period,summary:[{provider,appointments,revenue}],totalRevenue} — the exact keys the panel renders. status='completed'|'paid' AND date within `period` days gate inclusion. POISON: price coerced via Number()+Number.isFinite so '1e999'/'Infinity'/'NaN' collapse to 0; totalRevenue stays finite. Pure compute, no STATE. Pinned by server/tests/services-lens-macros.test.js.
